layers.translation_en: Things have roots and branches; affairs have beginnings and endings. Knowing what comes first and what comes after, you come near the Way.

reading_units.text: 物有本末，事有終始，知所先後，則近道矣。

chapter.summary: 事有終始，知所先後，則近道矣
chapter.text: 物有本末，事有終始，知所先後，則近道矣。
chapter.title: 物有本末

source_title: 四書章句集注 : 大學章句
